title: Set of 4 Rose with Stem Cocktail Glass, 175 ml Flower Red Wine Glass, Crystal Clear Rose Goblet Glasses, Champagne Flutes Drinkware for Mother's Day Gift, Wedding, Party, Dinner, Birthday
features: Package: Our product includes 4 packs of rose cocktail glass wine cups, versatile for any drink such as red wine, white wine, whiskey cocktails, lemonade, juice, bringing an unexpected beauty to your table.
Size: Mezchi flower red wine glass measures 8.6'' in height. The base of the cup measures 2.7'' in diameter. The capacity of this cup is 6 fl oz, a perfect size to drink red wine.

Premium Material: Made of high-quality borosilicate glass, non-toxic and odorless, Mezchi clear rose goblet is not afraid of boiling or cold. Highly transparent, it's so clear to show the color of the drinks in it.
Beautiful Design: The tall and long-stem goblet flutes are easy to hold. With an elegant rose shape, Mezchi cocktail wine cup is good-looking and gorgeous, looks classy and elegant.
Widely Used: Mezchi rose goblet is ideal for family gatherings, romantic weddings, engagement parties, birthday celebrations, etc. Also, it can be a great gift to those who like tasting red wine.
